inquiries.query:
/*Practice Problem 1
In the invoices_fact table add the hours_spent to the hours_rate. 
This could be used to prioritize tasks, higher values could indicate tasks that are both time-intensive and costly, 
therefore requiring early attention.*/
SELECT
	activity_id,
    project_id,
    hours_spent,
    hours_rate,
    hours_spent + hours_rate AS hours
FROM invoices_fact
ORDER BY 
	hours DESC
inquiries.name: 24_02_26_prblm1
